title: ConflictDetection
description: Records a potential or actual conflict between multiple agent sessions modifying overlapping files or governance state. Used by multi-agent coordinators to detect, classify, and resolve conflicts before they produce merge failures. This is Phase 5d (Multi-Agent Coordination) governance artifact.

conflict_id.description: Unique identifier for this conflict detection record.

detected_at.description: Timestamp when the conflict was detected.

detection_phase.description: When in the agent lifecycle the conflict was detected. 'pre_execution' = before agents start work (planning phase). 'in_progress' = while agents are actively modifying files. 'post_execution' = after agents complete but before PR creation. 'pre_merge' = during PR merge sequencing.

agents.description: The agent sessions involved in the conflict. At least two agents are required for a conflict.

session_id.description: Unique session identifier for this agent's execution context.

issue_number.description: GitHub issue number the agent is working on.

branch.description: Git branch name the agent is working on.

path.description: File path relative to repository root.

modification_type.description: Type of modification the agent made or plans to make.

sections_affected.description: Specific sections or line ranges affected within the file (e.g., 'lines 10-25', 'function doAuth', 'Phase 5 section'). Optional — used for fine-grained overlap detection.

files_modified.description: Files this agent has modified or plans to modify.

identifier.description: Identifier of the specific governance artifact (e.g., 'default.yaml', 'panel-output.schema.json').

change_description.description: Brief description of the governance state change.

governance_state_modified.description: Governance artifacts this agent has modified or plans to modify.

overlap.description: Details of the detected overlap between agents.

overlap_type.description: Classification of overlap. 'exact_file' = same file modified by multiple agents. 'directory' = different files in the same directory modified. 'governance_state' = same governance artifact modified. 'semantic' = logically related changes that may conflict even without file overlap.

overlapping_paths.description: File paths or governance artifact identifiers where overlap was detected.

path.description: File path where section-level overlap was detected.

agent_sections.description: Per-agent section breakdown for this file.

overlapping_sections.description: Fine-grained section-level overlap details. Optional — populated when section data is available.

overlap_description.description: Human-readable description of what overlaps and why it may cause a conflict.

severity.description: Conflict severity. 'blocking' = agents cannot proceed without resolution (e.g., exact file overlap with incompatible changes). 'advisory' = overlap detected but agents may proceed with caution (e.g., directory-level overlap on different files).

resolution.description: How the conflict was or should be resolved.

strategy.description: Resolution strategy. 'serialize' = execute agents sequentially instead of in parallel. 'rebase' = later agent rebases onto earlier agent's changes. 'merge' = attempt automatic merge. 'abort' = cancel one agent's work. 'human_escalate' = require human decision. 'section_partition' = agents work on non-overlapping sections of the same file. 'pending' = resolution not yet determined.

resolved_by.description: Agent or human who resolved the conflict.

priority_agent.description: Agent ID given priority in the resolution (e.g., the agent working on a higher-priority issue).

priority_reason.description: Why this agent was given priority (e.g., 'P0 issue vs P2 issue', 'security fix vs enhancement').

merge_result.description: Result of merge attempt, if strategy was 'merge' or 'rebase'.

correlation_ids.description: Trace IDs or other identifiers for cross-referencing with orchestration logs.
